qualification: One fresh read-only agent context inspected only the 0.3 SKILL.md and classified the seven fixed scenarios. This is a routing smoke test, not a deterministic runtime conformance test.

records.scenario: Plain explicit invocation for 80 similar JavaScript-to-Rust codec ports with per-item and integration parity oracles, transferable Unicode and escaping corrections, and preparation plus trial estimated at 10 percent.
records.evidence: All four criteria hold, including the one-quarter amortization limit.

records.scenario: Plain explicit invocation for one high-risk async lifecycle ticket with targeted and integration tests.
records.evidence: This is one high-risk change set with executable oracles.

records.scenario: Plain explicit invocation to rename one local variable.
Plain explicit invocation to explain the current architecture without edits.
Explicit Factory invocation for 40 similar modules when no compiler, tests, executable reference, or runnable reproduction can be established during preparation.
records.evidence: Explicit Factory without an executable oracle blocks after preparation.

records.scenario: Plain explicit invocation for eight simple ports with a full parity oracle when preparation plus trial is estimated at 60 percent of the work.
records.evidence: The work fails the one-quarter amortization gate.

records.scenario: Explicit Patch invocation for one risky parser compatibility change.
